help.title: Help & Support
help.faq_matchingAnswer: PKLBallPlus Court Connect uses a Tinder-style swipe system. Swipe right to 'Rally' with a player, left to 'Pass'. When both players rally, it's a match! You can then chat and schedule games.
help.faq_xpAnswer: You earn XP for completing your profile, matching with players, playing games, checking into courts, and more. XP levels you up and unlocks badges and rewards.
help.faq_skillAnswer: Skill levels follow the standard USAPA rating system (2.5 - 5.0+). You set your own skill level during onboarding. As you play more games, your rating may be adjusted based on game results.
help.faq_dataAnswer: Yes! We use end-to-end encryption for all messages, and your personal information is never shared without your consent. You control what's visible on your profile.
help.faq_endorsementsAnswer: After playing with someone, you can endorse their skills (Power, Kitchen, Strategy, etc.). Endorsements build your reputation and increase your XP.
help.faq_courtsAnswer: Use the Courts tab to find pickleball courts near you. You can filter by indoor/outdoor, amenities, and check real-time availability.
help.faq_premiumAnswer: Premium unlocks unlimited swipes, advanced filters, profile boost, see who liked you, and priority matchmaking. It's $9.99/month or $79.99/year.
help.faq_report: How do I report a user?
help.faq_reportAnswer: On any player's profile, tap the 'Report' button. You can report inappropriate behavior, fake profiles, or safety concerns. Our team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
help.guideGettingStarted1: 1. Create your account with email or Google sign-in.
help.guideGettingStarted2: 2. Complete your profile — add your skill level, play style, and vibe to get better matches.
help.guideGettingStarted3: 3. Browse nearby players using the Swipe deck — swipe right to Rally, left to Pass.
help.guideGettingStarted4: 4. When you and another player both Rally, it's a Match! Chat and schedule games.
help.guideGettingStarted5: 5. Use the Courts tab to find and check into nearby pickleball courts.
help.guideGettingStarted6: 6. Earn XP by playing, matching, and completing achievements to level up!
help.guideSafety1: Always meet in public places such as established pickleball courts.
help.guideSafety2: Let someone know where you're going, or share your live location.
help.guideSafety3: All chats are end-to-end encrypted — your messages stay private.
help.guideSafety4: Report any suspicious behavior — our team reviews reports within 24 hours.
help.guideSafety5: Block any user instantly from their profile or from Settings > Blocked Users.
help.guideSafety6: We never share your exact location — distance shown is approximate.
help.guideTerms1: You must be 18+ to use PKLBallPlus Court Connect.
help.guideTerms2: You agree to provide accurate profile information.
help.guideTerms3: You will not use the platform for harassment, spam, or fraud.
help.guideTerms4: PKLBallPlus reserves the right to suspend accounts violating community guidelines.
help.guideTerms5: Premium subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled 24 hours before renewal.
help.guideCommunity1: Be respectful — treat all players the way you'd want to be treated.
help.guideCommunity2: No harassment, hate speech, or discriminatory behavior.
help.guideCommunity3: No fake profiles or misleading information.
help.guideCommunity4: Play fair — accurately represent your skill level.
help.guideCommunity5: Honor your game commitments — show up on time or cancel in advance.
help.guideCommunity6: Endorse players honestly based on actual gameplay experience.
help.reachOut: Reach out and we'll get back to you

tutorial.step1Desc: Swipe through nearby pickleball players and find your perfect partner based on skill level, play style, and schedule.
tutorial.step2Desc: Message your matches with end-to-end encrypted chat. Share locations, plan games, and build your pickleball community.
tutorial.step3Desc: Find courts near you with real-time player counts, ratings, and check-in. Never play on an empty court again.
tutorial.step4Desc: Earn XP, unlock achievements, climb the leaderboard, and watch your skills improve over time.
